cases.title: OrganizerAdmin exports event operational eligibility data via GET export
preconditions: Completed or post-event event with at least one registration and evaluated eligibility outcomes
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope to the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with organizer Authorization bearer token and Accept text/csv
Inspect response headers and CSV body
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with Content-Type text/csv, Content-Disposition attachment filename, and CSV rows covering participant operational eligibility data; Organizer Admin can export event operational data for internal reporting per FR-24 and GET /events/{eventId}/export contract

cases.title: Export CSV includes eligibility result and reason for each registration row
preconditions: Event with mix of Eligible, NotEligible, and optionally Revoked registrations after eligibility evaluation
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Invoke exportEligibilityCsv for eventId without eligibility filter
Parse CSV header and data rows
Cross-reference eligibility and reason columns with GET /events/{eventId}/eligibility list entries
cases.expected: Each data row includes participantId, registrationId, registrationState, eligibility (Eligible, NotEligible, or Revoked), and non-empty human-readable reason derived from reasonCode/reasonText; export supports certificate-eligible participant list reporting without manual processing per testing-plan §3 rows Eligibility evaluation pass/fail (AC-09) and Organizer views eligible list (AC-10) and business workflow Stage 5

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin exports Eligible-only list using eligibility filter
preconditions: Event with at least one Eligible and one NotEligible registration
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export?type=eligibility&eligibility=Eligible with admin token
Verify every data row has eligibility Eligible
cases.expected: HTTP 200 CSV containing only Eligible registrations; filtered export matches organizer need to export certificate-eligible participant lists per business workflow Stage 5 step 5 and AC-10b eligibility filter contract

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin exports NotEligible-only list using eligibility filter
preconditions: Event with at least one Eligible and one NotEligible registration
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export?type=eligibility&eligibility=NotEligible with admin token
Verify every data row has eligibility NotEligible
cases.expected: HTTP 200 CSV containing only NotEligible registrations with reasons visible; supports internal reporting on participants requiring follow-up per business workflow export of NotEligible lists and AC-10b filter contract

cases.title: Unfiltered export row count matches eligibility list total metadata
preconditions: Event with multiple registrations spanning eligibility states
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export without eligibility filter and read X-Export-Row-Count header
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=1 and read total from paginated envelope
Compare export row count to eligibility list total
cases.expected: X-Export-Row-Count equals eligibility list total; full operational export is complete and not truncated by pagination pageSize per FR-31 list contract contrast

cases.title: Export reflects attendance and feedback outcomes in eligibility evaluation
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed: register, check-in, complete event, submit feedback, eligibility evaluated
Known Attended participant with mandatory feedback submitted
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Export eligibility CSV for the event
Locate Attended participant row and participant who missed check-in or feedback
cases.expected: Attended participant with satisfied rules appears Eligible with matching reason; no-show or missing-feedback participant appears NotEligible with deterministic reason codes; export operational data reliable for improvement decisions per MVP exit indicators

cases.title: OrganizerStaff on assigned event can export operational data
preconditions: Event with eligibility data assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with CSV attachment; scoped staff export permitted per permission matrix Export reports Scoped/optional for OrganizerStaff on assigned events

cases.title: Governance flow exports operational data after dashboard and history review
preconditions: Event with registrations, status history entries, and dashboard metrics
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard and confirm operational activity
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history and confirm traceable transitions
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export and save CSV
cases.expected: Export succeeds after monitoring steps; exported eligibility rows align with dashboard eligibility totals and traceable registration states per user-flow governance step Admin exports operational data and monitoring/reporting workflow

cases.title: Organizer eligibility list export action downloads CSV file
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in with scope to event with eligibility results
Organizer eligibility management page reachable with segmented eligibility tabs (Eligible, NotEligible, PendingEvaluation, Revoked) and export trigger per page-list
steps: Navigate to organizer eligibility list for the event
Select an eligibility segmented view tab
Click export action on eligibility page
Observe browser download and file contents
cases.expected: CSV file downloads with eligibility operational data matching current segmented view context; export trigger on eligibility page satisfies organizer review/export context per wireframes, page-list export action spec, and AC-10f segmented UI contract

cases.title: Organizer export center triggers event operational data download
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in
Governance export center page available with link to event export
steps: Navigate to organizer governance export center
Select or trigger export for a scoped event
Confirm CSV download initiates
cases.expected: Export center provides organizer path to download operational reporting file without manual API invocation; aligns with UI governance pages export center spec

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET export returns 401
preconditions: Existing event with exportable operational data
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; event operational export not exposed to anonymous callers per AC-15

cases.title: Participant cannot export event operational data
preconditions: Event with eligibility export data
Participant JWT registered on the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 forbidden; export reports capability denied to Participant per permission matrix and AC-10e out-of-scope actor pattern

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot export data for out-of-scope event
preconditions: Event with operational data not assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to a different event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/export with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope-hiding policy; no cross-event operational data leakage via export

cases.title: Export request for non-existent eventId returns 404
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
eventId that does not exist or is not in actor scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unknownEventId}/export with organizer token
cases.expected: HTTP 404 with typed error envelope; no partial CSV payload returned

cases.title: Unsupported export type query parameter returns 400
preconditions: Event with eligibility data
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export?type=registrations with admin token
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with INVALID_INPUT and message indicating unsupported export type; only supported operational export types accepted

cases.title: Invalid eligibility filter value returns 400
preconditions: Event with eligibility data
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export?eligibility=InvalidState with admin token
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with INVALID_INPUT and details for invalid eligibility filter; no CSV body returned per AC-10b invalid filter contract

cases.title: Export for event with zero registrations returns header-only CSV
preconditions: Published event with no participant registrations
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with admin token
Parse CSV content and X-Export-Row-Count header
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with CSV header row only and X-Export-Row-Count 0; valid empty export rather than error for newly published event

cases.title: Export includes Revoked eligibility with override metadata when admin revoked
preconditions: Registration with eligibility previously revoked by OrganizerAdmin with reasonCode and reasonText
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Export eligibility CSV without filter
Locate revoked registration row
cases.expected: Row shows eligibility Revoked with non-empty reason derived from reasonCode/reasonText and overriddenBy populated; export captures admin override outcome for internal governance reporting per FR-37 and AC-10d

cases.title: Export returns full dataset without pagination envelope truncation
preconditions: Event with total registrations exceeding default list pageSize (20)
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Export eligibility CSV for event
Compare X-Export-Row-Count to eligibility list total with pageSize=1 query
cases.expected: Export includes all matching registrations in one CSV response; internal reporting receives complete operational dataset not limited to a single paginated page per NFR-16 bounded-list contrast

cases.title: Export eligibility outcomes are deterministic for fixed event state
preconditions: Event with fixed attendance and feedback fixture state
No concurrent registration or rule changes during test
steps: Export eligibility CSV twice in succession without intervening mutations
Compare eligibility and reason columns row-by-row
cases.expected: Both exports produce identical eligibility results and reasons; operational data reliable enough to support improvement decisions for subsequent event runs per MVP exit indicators and AC-09a deterministic evaluation

cases.title: Export response uses attachment disposition suitable for secure organizer download
preconditions: Event with exportable eligibility data
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with admin token
Inspect Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers
cases.expected: Content-Type is text/csv with charset and Content-Disposition is attachment with event-scoped filename; response formatted for organizer internal download not inline public rendering

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin exports Revoked-only list using eligibility filter
preconditions: Event with at least one Revoked registration after admin eligibility revocation and at least one Eligible registration
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export?type=eligibility&eligibility=Revoked with admin token
Verify every data row has eligibility Revoked with override reason visible
cases.expected: HTTP 200 CSV containing only Revoked registrations with non-empty reason and overriddenBy metadata; supports governance reporting on admin-revoked certificate eligibility per FR-37, AC-10d, and AC-10b filter contract
